solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert very specific strings that constrain implementation unnecessarily. Only test_setup_script_requires_positional_arg actually executes the script. The repo lint/typecheck/format tests execute behavior but are pass-to-p

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests cannot be satisfied by stub implementations. The base repo has nightly.yml present (test_nightly_workflow_removed would fail), preview.yml lacks push trigger (test_preview_workflow_continuous_build would fail), README references nightly (test_readme_documents_preview_install would fail), setup script defaults to nightly (test_setup_script_requires_positional_arg would fail), and script contains allowedOverwrites (test_setup_script_no_overwrite_protection would fail). behavior_in_tests.reason: All major behaviors from the instruction are tested: nightly.yml removal, preview.yml push trigger extension, script positional arg requirement, script overwrite protection removal, README update, CONTRIBUTING.md update, and pass-to-pass gates for lint/typecheck/format.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized into clearly labeled sections (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass, Anti-regression) with descriptive function names and docstrings explaining each check.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task involves workflow files, scripts, and documentation — no structured data output (JSON/CSV/API/DB) is produced.

no_typos.reason: No typos found in filenames, paths, commands, or variable names in the instruction or test files.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction names the files to modify (which is appropriate for this task domain) but doesn't specify exact lines, variable names to remove (like 'allowedOverwrites'), or specific code patterns to change.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: The gold patch shows localized changes to specific files (delete nightly.yml, modify preview.yml, modify script, update docs) — not full-file rewrites. Changes are consistent with the instruction.
